news.headline: Armed Forces Medical Examiner System Supports Artemis II Mission
news.summary: The Armed Forces Medical Examiner System provides critical forensic pathology and contingency logistics for NASA's crewed launches to ensure immediate medical and investigative readiness in the event of a mishap.
